notes: v0.29.4 — Shop mockups round 2. Killed the rotating chromatic rings on shop cards (they stole the eye from the actual skin). Replaced HOLOGRID with 4 brand-new full-shop layouts wired to a real CATEGORY tab row (FEATURED · SHIPS · PROJECTILES · TRAILS · BUNDLES): FEATURED + CATS (cleaned shelf), CATEGORY HUB (sidebar + grid), DAILY ROTATION (today + tomorrow + browse), EDITORIAL ROWS (App-Store-style hero + named collection rows), BUNDLE BAZAAR (3 bundle packs + standalone). MUSIC STAGE retained as the audio-reactive option. TESTS > SHOP MOCKUPS to flip between them and pick one — winner becomes the live shop in v0.29.5.
